quote: Revamp Your CES Presence: Why a Redesign of Woodoo is Crucial for Success.
mission: Improve the website's overall user experience by making it easier to navigate, highlighting key products and features, and ensuring that the website is accessible and engaging to all visitors.
Additionally, a refreshed and modern design can create a positive impression of Woodoo and help to differentiate it from competitors.
process: The process for Woodoo's website redesign involved research, analysis, strategy, wireframing, visual design, prototyping, collaboration, testing, and launch.

I began by researching the target audience, industry trends, and competitors, and then analyzed the findings to identify user needs and opportunities for improvement. I then created a design strategy, wireframes, and visual designs that incorporated the company's brand and visual identity. I worked closely with developers and stakeholders to ensure that the design was implemented correctly and tested the website's usability before launch.
kpi: The redesign had a highly positive impact on both the company's market positioning and its appeal to investors. Because CES 2021 was an all-digital event, the new website served as Woodoo's primary storefront and successfully handled a massive influx of global press and investor traffic.

Following the launch and the virtual event, Woodoo observed a significant, sustained increase in both overall website traffic and the average time visitors spent engaging with their core products and technologies.
facts: I focus on crafting web experiences and designs that work.
In early 2021, Woodoo underwent a website redesign with the goal of improving the user experience and better showcasing the company's products and services.
intro: The redesign of the www.woodoo.com website for CES was especially important as it is a high-profile event where companies showcase their latest products and technologies. The website needs to effectively communicate Woodoo's brand and offerings to potential customers and partners. Overall, a successful redesign of the www.woodoo.com website for CES can help to drive traffic, generate leads, and ultimately contribute to the company's success at the event and beyond.

galleryMetadata.description: A seamless blend of physical Woodoo materials and the digital interface, highlighting the tactile nature of augmented wood.
Responsive design showcasing Woodoo's different natural species and material characteristics across tablet and mobile touchpoints.
A clean, editorial-style mobile interface emphasizing readability, modern typography, and immersive storytelling.
UI concept for smart mobility and automotive surfaces, showcasing revolutionary touch-sensitive augmented wood integration.
The fully responsive desktop homepage design displayed in a clean workspace environment, focusing on large, impactful imagery.
A closer look at the digital application interacting with physical Woodoo samples, bridging industrial manufacturing with digital showcases.
A dynamic 3D showcase of the Woodoo mobile app's user journey, emphasizing clean components, carbon-negative commitments, and intuitive navigation.
